name: Peperoncini Stuffed with Smoked Salmon & Dill Cream
recipeIngredient: 20 pickled Tuscan peppers (peperoncini), drained after removing two 9-ounce jars
3 ounces thinly sliced smoked salmon, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the stem ends of the peperoncini at an angle and discard the seeds and ribs while wearing rubber gloves.
2. Let the peperoncini drain on paper towels.
3. In a bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese and butter until smooth. Add the dill, shallot, and lemon juice, and combine well.
4. Stir in the chopped smoked salmon and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Transfer the mixture to a pastry bag fitted with a 1/2-inch decorative or plain tip.
6. Pipe the dill cream into each peperoncini. The prepared peperoncini may be kept covered and chilled up to one day in advance.
